tweet: Formally objected to all six states (AZ, GA, MI, NV, PA, WI).  Proud to fight for the voices of Virginia’s 5th and all Americans who want to ensure the integrity of the election.  https://t.co/RgIP1EABVm

name: Congressman Bob Good
tweet: This is about protecting the integrity of our election system that defines our republic.  Today, I will OBJECT to the certification of electors.   https://t.co/oKH2Jyvgyf

name: Congressman Bob Good
tweet: Americans deserve to have confidence in the integrity & results of the election.  On Jan 6, I’ll be objecting to the certification of electors in multiple states.  This vote is about ensuring the will of the people is accurately, justly & constitutionally followed.

name: Congressman Bob Good
tweet: House Democrats’ proposed new rules undercut the ability to challenge the Left’s radical agenda.   This package undermines the integrity of our legislative process, and enables policies rooted in socialism & identity politics.  I voted no.

name: Congressman Bob Good
tweet: Today, I had the honor of taking  the oath of office and being sworn into the 117th Congress.   It is a true privilege to represent all of Virginia's Fifth District — & I look forward to fighting for our economic prosperity, our religious freedoms, the sanctity of life and more!  https://t.co/s4EdVtWLUa

name: Congressman Bob Good
tweet: Today, I voted against Nancy Pelosi for Speaker of the House.  A politician who supports locking down businesses while personally defying those same policies shouldn’t be leading the House of Reps.   My vote went to @GOPLeader McCarthy. 🇺🇸
